# Maker Ecosystem Integration Mastery

This mastery hub synchronizes the **diverse official maker skills** currently active in the `.ai/skills` system that fall outside the primary cloud/auth/intelligence hubs. It ensures complete parity across the specialized technology ecosystem.

## 🛠️ Synced System Capabilities
The following specialized clusters are linked directly to the executable `.ai/skills` directory:

### Data & Backend Platforms
- **ClickHouse**: `sql`, `architecture-advisor`, `best-practices`.
- **Neon Database**: `postgres`, `egress-optimizer`.
- **AxiomHQ**: `apl-query`, `dashboards`, `sre`.
- **Deno Land**: `deno-expert`, `deploy`, `sandbox`.

### Mobile & Cross-Platform
- **Flutter**: `architecting`, `state-management`, `native-interop`.
- **Expo / Callstack**: `mobile-optimization`, `react-native-best-practices`.

### Automated Intelligence (Scrapers & Agents)
- **Apify**: `actor-development`, `actorization`, `ultimate-scraper`.
- **Firecrawl**: `scrape`, `crawl`, `map`, `agent`.
- **Browser-use / Browserbase**: `cloud`, `ui-test`, `browser-functions`.

### Specialized Toolsets
- **ElevenLabs**: `text-to-speech`, `sound-effects`, `agents`.
- **Figma**: `code-connect`, `design-system-rules`, `generate-library`.
- **PostHog**: `product-analytics`, `feature-flags`.

## 🔗 Integrated Sub-Skills (Complete List)
*The system maintains 1:1 parity with the following `.ai/skills/official-*` capability nodes:*

- `official-apify-*` (4 skills)
- `official-clickhouse-*` (6 skills)
- `official-firecrawl-*` (8 skills)
- `official-flutter-*` (22 skills)
- `official-figma-*` (7 skills)
- `official-elevenlabs-*` (6 skills)
- ... (Total: 400+ specialized synced skills)

## 📥 Execution Protocol
To invoke any of these synced skills within a project, use the corresponding slash command mapped in the system router.
